zh.lifeSummary: 當Louis d'Evreux於1276年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾艾福時，他的父親Philippe III le Hardi roi de France31歲，母親Maria van Brabant22歲。他於1301年與Marguerite d'Artois結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1319年5月19日在法國i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌隆朋吉素爾-爾享年43歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯沙吉登尼斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Louis d'Evreux于1276年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾艾福时，他的父亲Philippe III le Hardi roi de France31岁，母亲Maria van Brabant22岁。他于1301年与Marguerite d'Artois结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1319年5月19日在法国i萊-德-福朗斯艾頌隆朋吉素爾-爾享年43岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯沙吉登尼斯。

nameMeanings.name: d'Evreux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

variants.name: Devereaux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Everest
meanings: English (southeastern): of Norman origin, a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de). Compare Evers .

variants.name: Evers
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de).

English: de-aspirated variant of Heaver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Hever (Kent), named from Old English hēah ‘high’ + (Kentish) Old English ēfre ‘edge or brow of a hill’. Alternatively, the name may derive from some minor place in southeastern England named with Old English ȳfre, (Kentish) Old English ēfre, Middle English evere ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, with the addition of a prosthetic H-.
North German and Dutch: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Evert , which lost its t in pronunciation and spelling subsequently; compare Everts . Compare also Avers .

variants.name: Deveraux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Brendan, Clancy.
Irish (Offaly): of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devary
meanings: Probably Irish: variant of Devery, a variant of Devereux in counties Leix and Offaly.

variants.name: Debrow
meanings: Altered form of English or Irish   Devereux  .

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi
meanings: form, since the Middle Ages, of the French name Louis . In modern use it is also in part a transferred use of the surname derived from this given name, or from Anglicized forms of Gaelic Mac Lughaidh ‘son of Lughaidh ’ or Welsh Llewelyn .

en.lifeSummary: When Louis d'Evreux was born in 1276, in Évreux, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Philippe III le Hardi roi de France, was 31 and his mother, Maria van Brabant, was 22. He married Marguerite d'Artois in 1301. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 19 May 1319, in Longpont-sur-Orge, Essonne, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 43, and was buried in Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louis d'Evreux est né en 1276, à Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Philippe III le Hardi roi de France, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Maria van Brabant, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite d'Artois en 1301. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 19 mai 1319, à Longpont-sur-Orge, Essonne, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Louis d'Evreux 1276 in Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philippe III le Hardi roi de France 31 und seine Mutter Maria van Brabant 22. Er hat 1301 Marguerite d'Artois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 19. Mai 1319 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Longpont-sur-Orge, Essonne, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louis d'Evreux è nato il nel 1276 nel Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Philippe III le Hardi roi de France, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Maria van Brabant, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite d'Artois nel 1301. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 19 maggio 1319, nel Longpont-sur-Orge, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Louis d'Evreuxが1276年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアevレウックスで生まれた時，父Philippe III le Hardi roi de Franceは31歳，母Maria van Brabantは22歳であった。1301年にMarguerite d'Artoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1319年5月19日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスエソンロングプオント-スル-オルッジで43歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスセアイネ-サイント-デニスサイント-デニスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Louis d'Evreux(이)가 1276년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 e브레우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philippe III le Hardi roi de France(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria van Brabant(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1301년 Marguerite d'Artois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1319년 5월 19일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 에손 론그폰트-수-르지에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 세이인-세인트-데니스 세인트-데니스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louis d'Evreux nasceu em 1276, em Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Philippe III le Hardi roi de France, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Maria van Brabant, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite d'Artois em 1301. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 19 de maio de 1319, em Longpont-sur-Orge, Essonne, Île-de-France, França, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louis d'Evreux родился в 1276 г. в местности eвреукс, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Philippe III le Hardi roi de France было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Maria van Brabant, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite d'Artois в 1301 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 19 мая 1319 г. в местности лонгпонт-сур-ордж, эссонн, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-денис, сине-сеинт-денис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louis d'Evreux nació en 1276, en Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Philippe III le Hardi roi de France, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Maria van Brabant, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Marguerite d'Artois en 1301. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 19 de mayo de 1319, en Longpont-sur-Orge, Essonne, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Denis, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-France, Francia.
